description: Evaluates content management service maturity—service governance, KPIs/KRIs, content management policy, mobile content monitoring and distribution, virtual workspaces, mobile firmware management, and golden images.

capabilities.name: Service exists and is in good condition
capabilities.description: A content management service exists, tracks mobile content, and is reviewed at least quarterly for efficacy.

capabilities.name: KPIs/KRIs
capabilities.description: Content management KPIs and KRIs—including MDM coverage, policy compliance, and distribution success—are documented and reviewed at least quarterly.
evaluation_focus: Documented KPIs and KRIs for content management
MDM coverage and policy compliance metrics
Content distribution success and failure metrics

capabilities.name: Content management policy
capabilities.description: An enterprise-wide content management policy is formalized, documented, and reviewed at least quarterly for efficacy.

capabilities.name: Mobile content monitoring and distribution
capabilities.description: MDM or equivalent systems monitor, manage, and distribute enterprise content on mobile devices at enterprise scale.
evaluation_focus: Enterprise downloadable content monitoring and management

capabilities.name: Virtual workspace management
capabilities.description: Software or MDM manages virtual workspaces on corporate-owned personal mobiles with automated provisioning.
evaluation_focus: Virtual workspace management on corporate-owned personal mobiles

capabilities.name: Mobile firmware management
capabilities.description: Software or MDM upgrades mobile device firmware remotely with automated upgrade triggers.

capabilities.name: Golden images
capabilities.description: Golden images for assets especially endpoints are maintained, deployed enterprise-wide, applied during provisioning, and reviewed at least quarterly.

evaluation.resiliency_weight_policy: Ask stakeholder for per-capability weights when adding a new evaluation service. This service uses weight 1 for all capabilities.
evaluation.pillar_policy: Some services may have no Technology capabilities; in those cases, do not compute or report a Technology pillar score.
